name: Layla
intro: Layla, the Energy Gunner, is a hero in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang .

abilities.name: Malefic Gun
abilities.description: Buff Target locked. Fire! Layla deals increased damage to enemies farther away from her (starting at 100% and increasing to 130% at 6 units away). This does not include Turrets. Skill terms Physical Basic Attack Deal Physical Damage to enemies. Triggers ATK Effects and Lifesteal.

abilities.name: Malefic Bomb
abilities.description: Burst Buff Layla fires a Malefic Bomb in the target direction, dealing 200–400 (+80% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to the first enemy hit (can critically strike ). Upon hitting an enemy, Layla's Basic Attacks and Void Projectile gain extra range for 3 seconds, and she gains 60% Movement Speed that decays over 1.2 seconds. The duration of the Movement Speed boost is doubled if an enemy hero is hit. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Crit Damage The ratio of Crit Damage to Base Damage. The default is 200%. Crit Damage Dealt = Original Damage × (200% + All Crit Damage Increase% - All Crit Damage Decrease%).

abilities.name: Void Projectile
abilities.description: AOE Slow Layla fires an orb of Malefic Energy that explodes on hit, dealing 170–320 (+65% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to targets in the area and applying Magic Mark on them for 3 seconds. When Layla hits an enemy with a Magic Mark, she deals 100–200 (+35% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to nearby enemies and stuns them for 0.25 seconds. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp. Movement Speed Movement Speed on the battlefield. Usually Calculated and Actual Movement Speed is equal. But when Movement Speed is below 230 or over 420 both Slowdown and Speedup Effect will decay. Calculated Movement Speed = Basic Movement Speed × (100% + All Speedup Effect% - All Slowdown Effect%).

abilities.name: Destruction Rush
abilities.description: Burst Buff Layla fires a blast of Malefic Energy in the target direction, dealing 500–800 (+150% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in a line. Passive : The range of Layla's Void Projectile and Basic Attacks is increased by 0.6–1.8 units. Her sight range is also slightly increased each time this skill is upgraded. Skill terms Physical Damage Skill Deal Physical DMG to enemies. Triggers Spell Vamp.
